many.reason: Rich multi-week scenario already exercises the long, scrolling grouped list; no separate overflow state.

loading.reason: History is grouped synchronously from already-loaded workouts; no async pending state.

error.reason: groupByWeek is a pure total function; invalid dates are dropped, never an error; no-data is the empty archetype.

empty.reason: Static brand artwork; no data, so no empty state.

single.reason: Not a list/collection; a single fixed composition.

many.reason: Not a list; the mood comparison shows fixed variants, not overflow.

loading.reason: Static artwork rendered synchronously; no async state.

error.reason: Pure composition with no failure path.

key-interaction.reason: Non-interactive brand artwork; the icon has no user actions.

empty.reason: Demonstrated by the ask-coach-* application scenarios that render AskCoachView at the / route (coach tab): empty-chat (empty), run-or-rest (single/typical), knee-pain & race-taper (edge), and the seeded opening exchange (key-interaction send result). AskCoachView is a tab sub-view of the / ContentView entry point and cannot be isolated independently on this no-isolation Swift stack, so per-view taxonomy defers coverage to those entry-point app scenarios.

single.reason: Demonstrated by the ask-coach-* application scenarios that render AskCoachView at the / route (coach tab): empty-chat (empty), run-or-rest (single/typical), knee-pain & race-taper (edge), and the seeded opening exchange (key-interaction send result). AskCoachView is a tab sub-view of the / ContentView entry point and cannot be isolated independently on this no-isolation Swift stack, so per-view taxonomy defers coverage to those entry-point app scenarios.

typical.reason: Demonstrated by the ask-coach-* application scenarios that render AskCoachView at the / route (coach tab): empty-chat (empty), run-or-rest (single/typical), knee-pain & race-taper (edge), and the seeded opening exchange (key-interaction send result). AskCoachView is a tab sub-view of the / ContentView entry point and cannot be isolated independently on this no-isolation Swift stack, so per-view taxonomy defers coverage to those entry-point app scenarios.

many.reason: The rbAskSeedQuestion seed injects a single opening exchange; multi-turn threads accumulate only through live typing, which a static seeded capture cannot produce.

loading.reason: CoachEngine replies are computed synchronously on send; there is no async/pending state.

edge.reason: Demonstrated by the ask-coach-* application scenarios that render AskCoachView at the / route (coach tab): empty-chat (empty), run-or-rest (single/typical), knee-pain & race-taper (edge), and the seeded opening exchange (key-interaction send result). AskCoachView is a tab sub-view of the / ContentView entry point and cannot be isolated independently on this no-isolation Swift stack, so per-view taxonomy defers coverage to those entry-point app scenarios.

error.reason: BYOK gating added a real error path (keyed transient network/server failure -> honest retry bubble, AskCoachView.submit catch), but it is only reachable via a live network failure with a connected key; there is no offline preview seed hook, so it cannot be captured as a static seeded scenario.

key-interaction.reason: Demonstrated by the ask-coach-* application scenarios that render AskCoachView at the / route (coach tab): empty-chat (empty), run-or-rest (single/typical), knee-pain & race-taper (edge), and the seeded opening exchange (key-interaction send result). AskCoachView is a tab sub-view of the / ContentView entry point and cannot be isolated independently on this no-isolation Swift stack, so per-view taxonomy defers coverage to those entry-point app scenarios.

loading.reason: Seeded TodayState is read synchronously at launch; this MVP dashboard has no async fetch, so no loading state exists.

error.reason: No error path on the dashboard read; HealthKit-not-connected resolves to the Connect hero, covered by the empty archetype.

key-interaction.reason: Only action is the Connect Apple Health CTA; its connected result is shown by the dashboard scenarios and its logic is covered by testConnectFlipsState.

empty.reason: Fixed three-page welcome carousel; there is no zero-data or empty state

single.reason: Not a list view; fixed page set with no single-item boundary

many.reason: Exactly three pages; nothing to overflow or truncate

loading.reason: Renders synchronously at launch; no async pending state

error.reason: No fetch, validation, or failure path in the tour

empty.reason: Settings is a fixed-section form (account, health, coach, reminders, goal); it has no zero-data empty state.

single.reason: Not a list view; there is no single-item boundary.

many.reason: Fixed sections, not a variable-length list; nothing to overflow or truncate.

loading.reason: Settings reads stored state synchronously; account-sync pushes run in the background and are non-blocking, with no loading UI.

edge.reason: Settings renders fixed app copy and toggle rows with no user-variable-length data. The custom step goal's edge values (min 1,000 / max 50,000 / nearest-500 rounding) are not visually distinguishable in the below-fold goal card; they are covered by the clampGoal unit tests. Dynamic Type edges are covered by the ContentView accessibility scenarios.

error.reason: Sync failures are non-fatal and silent (local stays the source of truth); Settings has no error UI state.

empty.reason: Covered at the ContentView entry-point page level (owns the / app scenarios); TodayDashboard cannot be isolated on this no-isolation Swift stack

single.reason: Dashboard renders fixed sections, not an item list; no single-item boundary

typical.reason: Covered at the ContentView entry-point page level (owns the / app scenarios); TodayDashboard cannot be isolated on this no-isolation Swift stack

many.reason: Covered at the ContentView entry-point page level (owns the / app scenarios); TodayDashboard cannot be isolated on this no-isolation Swift stack

loading.reason: Today reads seeded state synchronously at launch; no async loading state on the dashboard

edge.reason: Covered at the ContentView entry-point page level (owns the / app scenarios); TodayDashboard cannot be isolated on this no-isolation Swift stack

error.reason: Mock mode reads local state; Today has no fetch/error path

key-interaction.reason: Covered at the ContentView entry-point page level (owns the / app scenarios); TodayDashboard cannot be isolated on this no-isolation Swift stack

many.reason: Fixed five-section recap, not a variable-length list; nothing to overflow or truncate.

loading.reason: Recap is generated synchronously from already-loaded TodayState (deterministic mock summarizer); no async pending state.

error.reason: Summarizer is a pure total function that always returns a review; the no-data path is the empty archetype, not an error.
